kickoff_budget_note: Within the default AGENTS.md low-risk budget: 3 completed tasks, 3 reviewed handoff files, no shared or integrator-locked edits, and required local gates rerun before handoff.
roadmap_items: Handoff packet scope accuracy: keep the reviewed commit description aligned with git history.
